feed.title: Ray CW
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: Nocterna - The Source of Magic
entry.summary: In the year 429 EP (Exodus Prior), an unnamed wizard of the great elven city-state of Althier discovered the prismatic wall. When the casting was complete, a great darkness fell over the city, as its denizen looked up in despair - for the Light had vanished without a trace. Within a matter of days, Shadows fell upon the city, slaughtering every man, woman and child GM Notes Each class in D...

entry.title: Nocterna - The Darkened Realm
entry.summary: A farmer awakes in the small village of Dawnmill, due east of the capital. He opens his windows and is greeted by a soft, orange glow, not that of the sun, but of the Light: a massive web of dancing lights that cover all the night skies. The orange aurora indicates the warm season continues. Amidst the orange are streaks of verdant green, which is a promise of a bountiful harvest. The farmer ...
